is_belgian_national.name: is_belgian_national
is_belgian_national.description: The person can prove they hold Belgian nationality.

is_foreigner.name: is_foreigner
is_foreigner.description: The person is a foreigner: they cannot prove they hold Belgian nationality.

is_union_citizen.name: is_union_citizen
is_union_citizen.description: The person is a citizen of the European Union.

falls_under_free_movement_law.name: falls_under_free_movement_law
falls_under_free_movement_law.description: The person falls under EU law on free movement as defined in Article 2(5) of the Schengen Borders Code.

is_third_country_national.name: is_third_country_national
is_third_country_national.description: The person is a third-country national: not an EU citizen and not covered by EU free movement law.

meets_entry_or_residence_conditions.name: meets_entry_or_residence_conditions
meets_entry_or_residence_conditions.description: The person meets or continues to meet the conditions for entry to or residence on the territory.

in_illegal_residence.name: in_illegal_residence
in_illegal_residence.description: The person is in illegal residence: present on the territory without meeting entry or residence conditions.

subject_to_removal_procedure.name: subject_to_removal_procedure
subject_to_removal_procedure.description: The person is subject to a removal procedure.

subject_to_international_protection_proc.name: subject_to_international_protection_procedure
subject_to_international_protection_proc.description: The person is subject to a procedure for granting international protection.

subject_to_responsibility_determination_.name: subject_to_responsibility_determination_procedure
subject_to_responsibility_determination_.description: The person is subject to a procedure to determine or transfer to the responsible member state for an international protection request.

risk_of_absconding.name: risk_of_absconding
risk_of_absconding.description: There is a risk of absconding: reasons exist to believe the person will abscond, established after individual examination based on objective criteria.

individual_examination_performed.name: individual_examination_performed
individual_examination_performed.description: An individual examination of the person has been performed.

holds_valid_travel_document.name: holds_valid_travel_document
holds_valid_travel_document.description: The person holds a valid travel document, valid passport, or valid identity document.

recognised_as_national_by_home_authority.name: recognised_as_national_by_home_authority
recognised_as_national_by_home_authority.description: The person has been recognised as a national by the national authority of their country, which declared willingness to issue a laissez-passer.

falls_under_nationality_category_for_min.name: falls_under_nationality_category_for_ministerial_laissez_passer
falls_under_nationality_category_for_min.description: The person falls under a nationality category for which the minister can issue a laissez-passer directly.

is_identified_foreigner.name: is_identified_foreigner
is_identified_foreigner.description: The person is an identified foreigner: holds a valid travel/identity document, or is recognised by home authority willing to issue laissez-passer, or falls under a ministerial laissez-passer nationality category.

no_residence_application_filed_after_ill.name: no_residence_application_filed_after_illegal_entry_or_during_illegal_stay
no_residence_application_filed_after_ill.description: The person did not file a residence application after illegal entry or during illegal stay, or did not submit an international protection request within the legally prescribed period.

used_false_information_or_documents_in_p.name: used_false_information_or_documents_in_procedure
used_false_information_or_documents_in_p.description: The person used false or misleading information, false or forged documents, committed fraud, or used other unlawful means in a protection, residence, removal, or pushback procedure.

failed_to_cooperate_with_authorities.name: failed_to_cooperate_with_authorities
failed_to_cooperate_with_authorities.description: The person does not cooperate or has not cooperated with authorities responsible for enforcement or supervision of entry, residence, establishment, and removal regulations.

indicated_or_demonstrated_non_compliance.name: indicated_or_demonstrated_non_compliance_with_measure
indicated_or_demonstrated_non_compliance.description: The person has indicated unwillingness to comply with, or has already failed to comply with, a transfer, pushback, removal measure, entry ban, less coercive measure, liberty-restricting measure, or equivalent measure by another member state.

subject_to_active_entry_ban.name: subject_to_active_entry_ban
subject_to_active_entry_ban.description: The person is subject to an entry ban in Belgium and/or another member state that has not been lifted or suspended.

filed_new_application_immediately_after_.name: filed_new_application_immediately_after_negative_decision
filed_new_application_immediately_after_.description: The person filed a new residence application or new international protection request immediately after being subject to a refusal of entry or residence, a decision ending their stay, or a pushback or removal measure.

concealed_prior_fingerprints_in_other_st.name: concealed_prior_fingerprints_in_other_state
concealed_prior_fingerprints_in_other_st.description: When questioned on this point, the person concealed that they had previously given fingerprints in another state bound by EU rules on determining the responsible state for an international protection request.

multiple_applications_with_negative_outc.name: multiple_applications_with_negative_outcomes_in_member_states
multiple_applications_with_negative_outc.description: The person has submitted multiple international protection requests and/or residence applications in Belgium or other member states that resulted in negative decisions or did not lead to a residence permit.

concealed_prior_international_protection.name: concealed_prior_international_protection_request_in_other_state
concealed_prior_international_protection.description: When questioned on this point, the person concealed that they had previously submitted an international protection request in another state bound by EU rules on determining the responsible state.

came_for_purposes_other_than_stated_in_a.name: came_for_purposes_other_than_stated_in_application
came_for_purposes_other_than_stated_in_a.description: The person declared or their file shows they came to Belgium for purposes other than those for which they submitted an international protection request or residence application.

fined_for_manifestly_unfounded_appeal.name: fined_for_manifestly_unfounded_appeal
fined_for_manifestly_unfounded_appeal.description: The person has been fined for submitting a manifestly unfounded appeal to the Council for Alien Law Litigation.

absconding_criterion_met.name: absconding_criterion_met
absconding_criterion_met.description: At least one of the objective absconding criteria listed in paragraph 2 is met for the person.
